summary: W921 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W920's mapped explicit cokernel closed-map leaf as the primitive closed-set image quantifier. The new mappedCokernelClosedMapPrimitiveW921 field states that every closed subset has closed image under every MetrizableLCA morphism, and mappedCokernelClosedMapOfPrimitiveW921 reconstructs W920's IsClosedMap field before projecting through the W920 route. Product success remains false because all W921 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W921 exposes the mapped-cokernel IsClosedMap field as a primitive closed-set image condition, but that primitive field and the rest of the W921 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W921 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W921 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions inherited through W920, raw target surjectivity and compactness propositions, raw selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 projection closed-map propositions, the primitive mapped explicit cokernel closed-set image proposition, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W921 closed-map mapped-cokernel-primitive-fields explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
